name: Smooth Anime
prompt_hint: Clean cel shading, soft gradients, polished anime lines.

name: Shonen Action
prompt_hint: Bold contrast, energetic highlights, action-first dramatic framing.

name: Shoujo Soft
prompt_hint: Pastel palette, delicate outlines, emotional softness.

name: Realistic

name: Gritty

name: Painterly
